pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Change the Maven groupId from the personal GitHub namespace to the official project domain.
Rename the root artifact ID to reflect its new role as a dependencies aggregator.
Bump the project revision from alpha3-SNAPSHOT to 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.
Replace deprecated javax.inject and javax.annotation dependencies with their Jakarta EE equivalents.
Upgrade SLF4J from version 1.7.x to 2.0.x to support newer logging frameworks and Java versions.
Upgrade Google Auto Service to version 1.1.1 for improved annotation processing support.
Introduce Jackson BOM to manage consistent versions of Jackson libraries across the project.
Add explicit dependencies for Logback Core and Classic to standardize logging implementation.
Add SnakeYAML dependency to support YAML configuration parsing.
Add JUnit 5 dependencies to modernize the testing framework.
Add AssertJ dependency to improve test assertion readability.
Add Mockito dependency to support mocking in unit tests.
Add JetBrains annotations for nullability and other code quality checks.
Refactor the Maven module structure to separate runtime, compile-time, and integration components.
Introduce a dedicated BOM (Bill of Materials) module for dependency management.
Create a new module structure for external integrations.
Update various Maven plugins (compiler, surefire, failsafe, etc.) to versions compatible with Java 21.
Add Maven GPG plugin configuration to support signing artifacts for release.
Add Nexus Staging Maven plugin to automate deployment to Maven Central.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the dependency-reduced-pom.xml generated by the Maven Shade Plugin to prevent committing build artifacts.
Ignore the target directory recursively to ensure all build outputs are excluded from version control.

CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md.general_idea: Updated the project team contact email in the Code of Conduct from a university address to a personal domain address.

LICENSE.general_idea: Switched the project license from MIT to Apache License 2.0.
LICENSE.human_impl: Replaced MIT License text with Apache License 2.0 header and copyright notice.

README.md.general_idea: Update the CI badge URL to point to the correct GitHub Actions workflow.
Correct the relative path for the header image to ensure it loads correctly.
Update the documentation link to the new domain.
Rewrite the introductory text to better explain the framework's value proposition and history.
README.md.human_impl: This project started out as a proof of concept (originally named SimpleDI)...

README.md.general_idea: Update the code example to use a more generic class name.
Add a new section explaining how WireDI differs from other frameworks.
README.md.human_impl: ### Yeah, I have seen this before... So, how does this framework differ from other frameworks?

README.md.general_idea: Refine the explanation of the framework's compile-time vs runtime behavior.
README.md.human_impl: Yes and no. It does a lot of work at compile time, but as a state, not completely.

README.md.general_idea: Add a detailed Quick Start section with installation instructions.
Update the Maven dependency coordinates to reflect the new group ID and artifact ID.
Add instructions for configuring the annotation processor in Maven.
Update the parent POM coordinates to the new group ID and artifact ID.
